description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a dark metallic body accented by red lines and subtle blue highlights. The fuselage is streamlined, with a pointed nose and a canopy-style cockpit situated near the front. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the body, featuring integrated engine nacelles with visible exhausts. The tail section is elongated, with a split V-tail configuration and no visible vertical stabilizer. The underside reveals retractable landing gear and a prominent forward-mounted weapon or sensor pod. The overall design suggests a high-performance, possibly military or sci-fi inspired aircraft, built for speed and agility.
description: A dark, futuristic airplane with swept-back low wings, a forward canopy cockpit, integrated engines, and a split V-tail, accented by red and blue highlights.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward canopy, and the wide, swept-back wings with visible engine intakes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, engine nacelles, and the forward-mounted pod.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the split V-tail, dual engine exhausts, and the angular trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the streamlined body, engine placement, and the extended tail section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept with slight anhedral angle, no visible winglets, integrated engine nacelles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the wings near the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Split V-tail configuration with two angled stabilizers, no central vertical stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with visible main and nose gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a canopy-style window.
